tool_args.label: ADA Upgrades at 149 St-Grand Concourse and Tremont Av
tool_args.raw_text: The project will provide ADA accessibility to three underground subway stations in the Bronx: the 149 St-Grand Concourse complex (2, 4, 5) and Tremont Av (B, D). The project will also provide free ADA transfers between subway lines at 149 St-Grand Concourse.

payload.project_name: ADA Upgrades at 149 St-Grand Concourse and Tremont Av
payload.description: ADA accessibility project providing elevators, stairs, and ADA boarding areas at 149 St-Grand Concourse complex (2, 4, 5) and Tremont Av (B, D) stations including free ADA transfers at 149 St-Grand Concourse

tool_args.label: ADA Package 3
tool_args.raw_text: This project bundle will provide ADA accessibility, including new elevators replacement elevators, and other improvements, at thirteen stations in four of the five New York City boroughs.

payload.project_name: ADA Package 3: Accessibility Upgrade, Station Improvement and Elevator Replacement at 13 Stations
payload.description: P3 project providing 20 new elevators at eight stations, elevator replacements at five stations, and the Livonia-Junius Intermodal Transfer Connection project

tool_args.label: ADA Package 5
tool_args.raw_text: This project bundle will provide ADA accessibility work at 13 Stations in all five New York City boroughs.

payload.project_name: ADA Package 5: Accessibility Upgrade, Elevator Replacement, Station Renewal, and Component at Eight (13)
payload.description: Design-build ADA accessibility project providing 18 new elevators and 4 ramps at 13 stations, including station renewal at 242 St, component work at New Lots Ave, and mainline track work

tool_args.label: ADA Upgrades at 68 St/Hunter College
tool_args.raw_text: This project is a design-build contract to provide ADA accessibility, including elevators and other improvements, at 68 St / Hunter College (6).

payload.description: Design-build project providing 3 new elevators, 2 new street-to-platform entrances, platform edge reconstruction, and utility work at 68 St/Hunter College (6) station
